grants.comment: claude-runner coder sessions: read-only estate visibility (resource state + runtime logs) — the agent debugs deployed apps but cannot change Azure outside GitHub Actions.

claude-coder broker: open Arc cluster-connect tunnels to the shared homelab k3s cluster (claude-k8s-preview lives in rg-claude-runner-preview — cross-RG, so the coder repo's SP cannot self-assign this). Data-plane auth stays a least-priv in-cluster SA token; this role only permits listClusterUserCredential for the proxy.
roles: Azure Arc Enabled Kubernetes Cluster User Role

grants.comment: claude-coder sessions: read-only estate visibility (resource state + runtime logs), matching the claude-runner coder profile — the agent debugs deployed apps but cannot change Azure outside GitHub Actions. Same identity on both backends (IMDS on ACI, workload-identity federation on the homelab cluster).

claude-coder broker: read the estate's single GitHub App private key from the shared vault (rg-claude-runner) to mint installation tokens for coder-portal sessions — instead of copying the PEM into a second vault. Read-only (Secrets User).

claude-coder coder profile: read/write on the estate's coder vault (kv-coder) — the same $PROFILE_KEYVAULT the claude-runner coder profile uses, so both platforms share one per-profile secret store. Cross-RG, so the coder repo's SP cannot self-assign this.
claude-coder cloud-sysadmin profile: read/write on the estate's cloud-sysadmin vault. Ask-first profile; the vault is its only writable secret store.

claude-coder local-sysadmin profile: read/write on the estate's local-sysadmin vault (ha-api-token, unifi-api-key live here). Homelab-only profile; staged until the per-profile k8s namespaces exist, but the grant is safe to land with the identity.

claude-coder personal assistant profile: read/write on the estate's personal vault (banking/API credentials seeded by Kenneth). Same one-vault-per-profile boundary as claude-runner's personal profile.

claude-coder business assistant profile: read/write on the estate's business vault. Deliberately NO shared-vault read and NO GitHub token access (enforced broker-side in claude-coder); Graph Mail.Read is a separate decision for Kenneth (graph-grants.json), not included here.
